gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/227)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/227)
text: رَأَيْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَدْ دَخَلَ الْكَعْبَةَ ثُمَّ أَرَادَ بَيْنَ الْعَمُودَيْنِ فَلَمْ يَقْدِرْ عَلَيْهِ فَصَلَّى دُونَهُ ثُمَّ خَرَجَ فَمَضَى حَتَّى خَرَجَ مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ .

en.hubeali: And from hi, from Ibn Fazzal, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,

‘I saw Abu Abdullahasws entering the Kabah, then intended to be between the two pillars, but was not able upon doing so, so heasws Prayed Salaat besides it. Then heasws exited, so heasws went until he had gone out from the Masjid’.
en.sarwar: 9. It is narrated from him (narrator of previous Hadith) from ibn Faddal from Yunus ibn Ya’qub who has said the following: “I saw abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, enter al-Ka‘bah and he (the Imam) wanted between the two pillars; but could not get there, he (the Imam) then performed Salat (prayer) nearby, then went out and continued walking until he left the Masjid.”
